Explanation: The clues point to Botswana: it has over 100 spoken languages, only 2 official languages (English and Setswana), a hunter-gatherer San society speaking endangered Khoe languages (including the river-named Khoe–Kwadi group), and experienced a literacy rate decline in 2010. Its population is projected to grow by over 90% by 2050. According to the most recent data, Duma Boko is listed as President of Botswana as of 2023 [59747].
Exact Answer: Duma Boko
Confidence: 90%
